description: Post-process search-engine results (idXML): optionally re-index peptides against a protein FASTA, estimate FDR/q-values, filter by FDR threshold / peptide length / best-hit-per-spectrum, then export a filtered idXML and a flat CSV of peptide hits.
rules: writes filtered.idXML and hits.csv under record_store
FASTA enables re-indexing (target/decoy + accessions); FDR requires decoys
usage: Set INPUT (idXML). Optional FASTA, FDR, MIN_LENGTH, MAX_LENGTH, BEST_PER_SPECTRUM=1. Output: filtered.idXML (+ hits.csv).
limitation: Requires pyOpenMS 3.5.0 (Python 3.9+) to produce real content; if absent the porter still creates filtered.idXML and records the reason.
